description: No arity diagnostic (issue #111): the parenthesized alternate/variadic forms the static arity check must leave alone. `(print "x" 1)` and `(word "a" "b" "c")` are open variadic (corePrimitiveArityRange max is infinite); `(random 1 5)` is `random`'s bounded two-input alternate form (max 2). `g` has a required parameter and an optional (defaulted) one — its optional argument can only be supplied via the parenthesized form, so `(g 1 2)` is within [1, 2] and the bare `g 1` meets the required floor. All clean: an empty diagnostics stream.
